ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Shooter, Action) */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "publisher_description" TEXT /* Description of the publisher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., PS5, Xbox Series X, PC) */,
  "platform_description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "developer_description" TEXT /* Description of the developer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_region_sales" (
  "game_region_sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-region sales record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the game table */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the region table */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales of the game in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_region_sales_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_devices" (
  "game_device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-device sales record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the game table */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., Console, PC, Mobile) */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device (e.g., Windows, iOS, Android) */,
  "device_screen_size" TEXT /* Screen size of the device (e.g., 10-inch, 13-inch) */,
  "device_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the device (e.g., Sony, Microsoft, Apple) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device (e.g., PS5, Xbox Series X, iPhone 13) */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales of the game on the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_user_reviews" (
  "game_user_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-user review record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the game table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user table */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user review */,
  "review_rating" REAL /* Rating of the user review (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_user_review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
